## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Pick the one matching your commit type (drives the release). -->

- [ ] `fix:` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat:` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] `docs:` / `chore:` / `test:` / `ci:` / `refactor:` — no release

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run format:check` pass
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] If detection, a parser, or a trigger changed, added coverage for the affected package manager(s)
- [ ] Updated the README if a command, flag, exit code, or the `.debtctl.json` schema changed
